Your Personal Morning Dashboard

James' Morning Briefing

Sunday, April 5, 2026
Top Story

US aviator rescued after F-15 fighter jet shot down over Iran; Trump threatens strikes

The US has rescued one crew member of a downed F-15 fighter jet in southern Iran. President Trump issued an expletive-laden threat on social media, warning Iran that 'Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day' if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened.

Read Full Story →

World News

US aviator rescued after F-15 fighter jet shot down over Iran; Trump threatens strikes

The US has rescued one crew member of a downed F-15 fighter jet in southern Iran. President Trump issued an expletive-laden threat on social media, warning Iran that 'Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day' if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened.

BBC / AP / Reuters · Middle East / Conflict · Read more

Pope Leo urges global leaders to end conflicts in Easter message

In his Easter message on Sunday, Pope Leo urged world leaders to abandon schemes for power, conquest, or domination and called for an end to conflicts raging across the globe.

Reuters · World / Religion · Read more

Russian drone strike on Ukrainian market kills five, wounds 19

A Russian drone hit a busy market in the frontline Ukrainian city of Nikopol on Saturday morning, killing five people and injuring 21 others.

Reuters / BBC · Russia-Ukraine War · Read more

Artemis II crew halfway to Moon after taking 'spectacular' Earth image

The Artemis II crew is now halfway to the Moon. Commander Reid Wiseman captured a stunning image of Earth from aboard the Orion capsule during the mission.

BBC · Space / Science · Read more

Seattle News

High-Speed Pursuit on I-5 Reaches 130 mph

Two people are in custody after a high-speed pursuit on I-5 from Federal Way to Lakewood that reached speeds of up to 130 mph, according to Washington State Patrol.

FOX 13 Seattle · Read more

The Picklr Opens New Seattle Location in Fremont

The Picklr will open its brand-new Seattle location in Fremont this weekend, with a grand opening celebration on Saturday, April 4.

KOMO News · Read more

Belltown Shooting Under Investigation

Seattle police are investigating a Friday night shooting on 3rd Avenue in Belltown.

KING 5 · Read more

Mariners Win in Extra Innings

Cole Young broke a scoreless tie with an RBI triple leading off the 10th inning, and Bryan Woo combined with the Seattle Mariners' bullpen to pitch 10 innings of scoreless baseball.

KING 5 · Read more

Technology

OpenAI GPT-5.4 Released with 1-Million-Token Context Window

OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.4 featuring a 1-million-token context window and the ability to autonomously execute multi-step workflows across software environments. This represents a significant leap in AI capability for enterprise automation.

Crescendo AI · News · Read more

Anthropic Acquires Biotech Startup for $400M

Anthropic has acquired a biotech startup for $400 million, signaling deeper expansion into AI-powered healthcare and life sciences applications.

The Neuron · News · Read more

Google Gemini 3.1 Pro Leads 13 of 16 Benchmarks

Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro continues to dominate the AI landscape, currently leading in 13 of 16 industry benchmarks. The model has positioned Google as the consumer AI leader in early 2026.

RenovateQR · News · Read more

Claude Code Source Code Leaked

Claude Code's source code appears to have accidentally leaked from Anthropic, though the company has not yet made an official statement about the incident.

Radical Data Science · News · Read more
